title: verbena officinalis var. officinalis
intro: Verbena officinalis var. officinalis, also known as Common Verbena or European Verbena, is a perennial plant belonging to the Verbena family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been employed to treat a variety of health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to exhibit immune-boosting properties, making it a valuable remedy for preventing illnesses and promoting overall well-being. Verbena officinalis var. officinalis is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in herbal blends and topical applications to harness its therapeutic benefits.
